text.title: Page Object Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a page-object file and its companion contract test. Both must validate before merge.

field.name: page_object.url_pattern
field.notes: regex or pathname this page maps to

forbidden.pattern: page_object.public_methods includes a name in the closed list of DOM-action verbs: type, click, hover, blur, focus, fill, press
locators include any of waitForTimeout, sleep, cy.wait with a numeric timeout
locators[].priority = css AND no comment explaining why role/test-id/text were not viable
test file outside pages/ calls page.locator, page.click, cy.get directly
page object missing a companion contract_test in pages/contracts/
contract_test.last_passed_at older than 30 days (snapshot rotted, page-object has drifted from reality)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Inline-compose two methods into one when they always run together with no decision points (e.g. fillEmail and fillPassword become loginAs).
Promote a locator to a getter-method when it returns a list whose length is meaningful (count of rows, count of errors).
Move a sub-component (modal, dropdown) into its own *.component.ts file when it has > 3 locators of its own.

list.item: Class extends BasePage / BaseComponent — no standalone page objects
Every locator uses the highest viable priority
Every public method is named at user-action level
No time-based waits anywhere in the file
Contract test exists, snapshot fresh, last passed within 30 days
Tests in `tests/` use page-object methods only, no direct DOM access
